mapper.sql: select step_id, run_id, step_code, status, input_json, output_snapshot, agent_session_id, error_message, started_at, finished_at, create_time from novel_workflow_step
mapper.select: where run_id = #{runId} order by step_id asc
where run_id = #{runId} and step_code = #{stepCode} order by step_id desc limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into novel_workflow_step ( run_id, step_code, status, input_json, output_snapshot, agent_session_id, error_message, started_at, finished_at, create_time ) values ( #{runId}, #{stepCode}, #{status}, #{inputJson}, #{outputSnapshot}, #{agentSessionId}, #{errorMessage}, #{startedAt}, #{finishedAt}, sysdate() )
